hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|vue|js|json|css)$'; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(\.env|secrets|credentials)'; then echo '不允许修改敏感文件' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
